title: deallocate <id> results in all prepared statements being deallocated (not error-related)
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_table (id INT PRIMARY KEY, name VARCHAR(100), created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP);
INSERT INTO test_table (id, name) VALUES (1, 'Test Entry 1');
INSERT INTO test_table (id, name) VALUES (2, NULL);
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM test_table WHERE name IS NULL;
